home.quote: Every act of generosity counts, and everyone can contribute to making the world a better place.

about.heroSubtitle: German Humanitarian Relief Organization providing assistance to crisis-affected regions worldwide.
about.story1: GHAR Foundation was established in Bremen, Germany, by a group of dedicated individuals who witnessed firsthand the devastating humanitarian crises in Sudan and Yemen. Driven by compassion and a sense of responsibility, they came together to create an organization that bridges the gap between those who want to help and those who need it most.
about.story2: The name "GHAR" — meaning "cave" in Arabic — symbolizes shelter and protection, reflecting our core mission to provide refuge and hope to those displaced by conflict and disaster.
about.story3: Since our founding, we have grown into a trusted humanitarian organization serving thousands of families across multiple crisis zones, while maintaining the highest standards of transparency and accountability.
about.missionDesc: To provide immediate and sustainable humanitarian aid to crisis-affected communities in Sudan, Yemen, and beyond — delivering clean water, food, medical care, and education while upholding human dignity and promoting long-term resilience.
about.visionDesc: A world where every person, regardless of where they live or what crisis they face, has access to the basic necessities of life — and where communities can rebuild, recover, and thrive with dignity and hope.
about.ctaSubtitle: Join us in our mission to bring relief and hope to those who need it most.
about.contactSubtitle: Send us a message and we will get back to you as soon as possible.
about.successMessage: Message sent successfully! We will be in touch soon.
about.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.

volunteer.heroSubtitle: Join our mission and make a real difference in the lives of those who need it most
volunteer.reason1Desc: Your skills and time directly help families in crisis zones across Sudan and Yemen.
volunteer.reason2Desc: Join a diverse team of volunteers from Germany and around the world united by one mission.
volunteer.reason3Desc: Gain valuable experience in humanitarian work while developing new skills and connections.
volunteer.formSubtitle: Fill in the form below and we will get back to you within 3-5 business days.

volunteer.ctaSubtitle: Whether you volunteer your time or donate, every contribution counts.

transparency.heroSubtitle: We believe that trust is built through openness. Here you will find everything you need to know about how we operate and use your donations.
transparency.efficiencyText1: We are committed to ensuring that the maximum possible portion of every donation goes directly to those who need it most. Our operational costs are kept to a minimum through efficient management and the dedication of our volunteers.
transparency.efficiencyText2: We follow the guidelines set by the DZI (Deutsches Zentralinstitut für soziale Fragen) and aim to achieve full certification as we grow.
transparency.efficiencyHighlight: of every euro donated goes directly to aid projects
transparency.ctaSubtitle: We are always happy to answer any questions about how we operate and use donations.
